source_gate_interpretation: The packet_022a_invented_site_18l gate failure represents a constraint-level check for Site 18-L that has no corroborating source evidence. Source documents (ACT-ACR-022, CAL-ACR-022, SITE-ACR-022, RC-ACR-022) consistently reference Site 18-P for activation, calibration, and release condition. The gate failure label appears to be an invented constraint artifact rather than a substantive source-grounded finding. Per STD-ACR-022-P, exact boundaries must be matched in source; source documents match on Site 18-P without reference to Site 18-L. The worker remediation is correct: explicit production-unit specification in CAL-ACR-022 satisfies the site-specific boundary requirement and overrides generic prefix warning in NOTE-ACR-022.
